violations.text: The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. Establishment is to obtain test strips. New Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2025
The 3 door reach-in was observed with an accumulation of ice build-up. Establishment is to run a defrost on unit. New Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2025
The floor tiles behind the counter area are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2026
